scripts.msix:dev: cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && (if not exist msix-stage mkdir msix-stage) && copy /Y src-tauri\target\debug\chromavale.exe msix-stage\ >nul && winapp run .\msix-stage
scripts.msix:pack: npm run tauri -- build && (if not exist msix-stage mkdir msix-stage) && copy /Y src-tauri\target\release\chromavale.exe msix-stage\ >nul && winapp pack .\msix-stage --cert .\devcert.pfx
